description: This is a Java test class that verifies Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) behavior for the AuthController in a Spring Boot application, including handling OPTIONS preflight requests and ensuring appropriate CORS headers are present in the POST response.

classes.name: test_auth_controller_cors_webmvc_test
classes.description: A Spring Boot test class that verifies CORS configurations for the AuthController, ensuring proper handling of OPTIONS preflight requests and inclusion of CORS headers in responses.

methods.name: preflight_register_isAllowed
methods.description: Tests that an OPTIONS preflight request to the registration endpoint responds with correct CORS headers.

methods.name: post_register_includesCorsHeaders
methods.description: Tests that a POST request to the registration endpoint includes the appropriate CORS headers in the response and returns the expected user data.
